argv: import hashlib,json,sys;from pathlib import Path;root=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI');sys.path.insert(0,str(root));from core.repair_bay_diagnostics import run_launcher_index,run_repair_bay_scan;from core.repair_bay_handoff import build_repair_handoff;from Departments.Engineering.mission_router import classify_mission;before={p.name:hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest() for p in root.glob('*.bat') if p.is_file()};scan=run_repair_bay_scan(root,mode='full',context={'validation':'repair_bay_v2_4_live_consistency'});index=run_launcher_index(root,context={'validation':'repair_bay_v2_4_live_consistency'});after={p.name:hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest() for p in root.glob('*.bat') if p.is_file()};assert before==after,'Launcher files changed during read-only validation';a=(scan.get('evidence') or {}).get('launcher_inventory') or {};b=index.get('inventory') or {};assert (a.get('evidence_consistency') or {}).get('finalized') is True,a;assert (b.get('evidence_consistency') or {}).get('finalized') is True,b;assert a.get('unresolved_items')==b.get('unresolved_items'),(a.get('unresolved_items'),b.get('unresolved_items'));assert a.get('raw_unknown_items')==b.get('raw_unknown_items'),(a.get('raw_unknown_items'),b.get('raw_unknown_items'));assert a.get('exact_duplicate_groups')==b.get('exact_duplicate_groups');ac={str(x.get('name') or '') for x in a.get('obsolete_looking_candidates') or []};bc={str(x.get('name') or '') for x in b.get('obsolete_looking_candidates') or []};assert ac==bc,(ac,bc);protected={str(x.get('name') or '').casefold() for x in ((a.get('protected_baseline') or {}).get('root') or [])};assert all(str(x.get('name') or '').casefold() not in protected for x in a.get('obsolete_looking_candidates') or []);assert all('exact_duplicate_content' in set(x.get('candidate_basis') or []) for x in a.get('obsolete_looking_candidates') or []);assert all(x.get('filename_only_cleanup_allowed') is False for x in a.get('obsolete_looking_candidates') or []);finding=next(x for x in scan.get('findings') or [] if x.get('id')=='root_launcher_inventory');packet=build_repair_handoff(root,scan,'root_launcher_inventory',level='advanced');assert packet.get('ok') is True,packet;decision=classify_mission(packet.get('engineer_command') or '');assert decision.mission_type=='plan' and decision.authorized is False,decision;assert set(packet.get('affected_paths') or []).issubset(ac),packet;for report in (scan,index): s=report.get('safety') or {}; assert s.get('network_used') is False,s; assert s.get('commands_run') is False,s; assert int(s.get('files_written') or 0)==0,s; assert int(s.get('repairs_applied') or 0)==0,s;print(json.dumps({'REPAIR_BAY_V2_4_LIVE_OK':True,'launchers':index.get('summary',{}).get('total'),'raw_unknown':len(a.get('raw_unknown_items') or []),'unresolved_after_resolution':len(a.get('unresolved_items') or []),'duplicate_groups':len(a.get('exact_duplicate_groups') or []),'review_candidates':sorted(ac),'workshop_route':decision.mission_type,'implementation_authorized':decision.authorized},indent=2))
